components.name: Stack
components.notes: Primary vertical composition primitive for product surfaces.

components.name: Flex
components.notes: Primary row and inline alignment primitive for product surfaces.

components.name: Grid
components.notes: Use when a real grid is needed; do not replace list-based settings layouts with Grid by default.

components.name: ProductPageShell
components.notes: Preferred page-level composition primitive for new product surfaces that need viewport-safe layout, heading structure, optional sidebar, main region, and footer.

components.name: ProductPanel
components.notes: Preferred semantic panel primitive for grouped product regions with heading, actions, body, and footer slots.

components.name: ProductSection
components.notes: Preferred section-level composition primitive when a surface needs consistent heading and spacing rhythm.

components.name: ProductDataView
components.notes: Preferred async collection primitive for results, tables, and lists that need ready, loading, empty, error, or busy state routing.

components.name: ProductStateWrapper
components.notes: Preferred local async-state wrapper inside panels and sections.

components.name: SectionHeader
components.notes: Preferred section heading primitive for grouped settings and product sections.

components.name: CollapsibleSection
components.notes: Preferred expandable section primitive when progressive disclosure is needed.

components.name: AlertDialog
components.notes: Preferred destructive confirmation primitive while Apps SDK UI lacks matching API parity.

components.name: DataTable
components.notes: Use for tabular data views; do not hand-roll table layouts when this fits.

components.name: ChatShell
components.notes: Preferred shell reference for chat-oriented surfaces.

components.name: SettingRow
components.notes: Existing settings row primitive that should anchor recipe-first normalization before any new exports are added.

components.name: SettingToggle
components.notes: Existing control-row primitive that should replace repeated hand-rolled toggle rows in settings surfaces.

components.name: SettingDropdown
components.notes: Existing settings selector primitive pending cluster-wide normalization.
